MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-13-2017 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MARGARET ASH MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIMS FOR EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AND ATTORNEYS' FEES FROM PLAINTIFF COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED AS TO THE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS ALLEGATIONS ALLEGED AGAINST HER BUT NOT ANY OTHER DEFENDANT AND DENIED AS TO THE ATTORNEY'S FEES ALLEGATIONS. THE EMOTIONAL DISTRESS ALLEGATIONS AGAINST MS. ASH RUN AFOUL OF THE RULE PROHIBITING RECOVERY FOR EMOTIONAL DISTRESS FOR NON-INTENTIONAL TORTS WHERE THERE HAS BEEN NO PHYSICAL INJURY ABSENT CERTAIN VERY LIMITED EXCEPTIONS WHICH ARE NOT APPLICABLE TO THE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN AN INSURED AND HIS INSURANCE AGENT. MR. GROSSMAN HAS ADEQUATELY ALLEGED ATTORNEY'S FEES AS DAMAGES AGAINST MS. ASH PER THE TORT OF ANOTHER DOCTRINE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2017 Continued To Aug-09-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Claims For Emotional Distress And Attorneys Fees From Plaintiff Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MARGARET ASH Motion To Strike Claims For Emotional Distress And Attorneys' Fees From Plaintiff Complaint is granted as to the emotional distress allegations alleged against her but not any other defendant and denied as to the attorney's fees allegations. The emotional distress allegations against Ms. Ash run afoul of the rule prohibiting recovery for emotional distress for non-intentional torts where there has been no physical injury absent certain very limited exceptions which are not applicable to the relationship between an insured and his insurance agent. Mr. Grossman has adequately alleged attorney's fees as damages against Ms. Ash per the tort of another doctrine. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Text Ruling
